<style id="wp-add-custom-css-single" type="text/css">
article.ast-article-single,
    article[class*="ast-article"],
    article[itemtype*="CreativeWork"],
    .entry-content,
    .entry-content.clear {
        padding: 0 !important;
        margin: 0 !important;
        width: 100% !important;
        max-width: 100% !important;
    }

    .entry-content.clear > p {
        padding: 0 !important;
        margin: 0 !important;
        width: 100% !important;
        max-width: 100% !important;
    }
.pricing-page {
        --f-primary: #3a4280;
        --f-accent: #3d35b1;
        --f-gradient: linear-gradient(
            135deg,
            #3a4280 0%,
            #3f3a9e 42%,
            #3d35b1 100%
        );
        --f-gradient-hero: linear-gradient(
            145deg,
            #2f3668 0%,
            #3a4280 38%,
            #3d35b1 72%,
            #4840c4 100%
        );
        --f-surface: #f5f3fb;
        --f-surface-card: #ffffff;
        --f-text: #201f1e;
        --f-text-muted: #605e5c;
        --f-link: #4f47c4;
        --f-elev-1:
            0 1px 2px rgba(61, 53, 177, 0.05), 0 2px 8px rgba(58, 66, 128, 0.06);
        --f-elev-2:
            0 4px 8px rgba(61, 53, 177, 0.08),
            0 12px 28px rgba(58, 66, 128, 0.1);
        --f-elev-3:
            0 8px 16px rgba(61, 53, 177, 0.12),
            0 24px 48px rgba(58, 66, 128, 0.14);
        --f-border: rgba(61, 53, 177, 0.12);
        --f-success: #0d8f6e;
        --f-success-soft: rgba(13, 143, 110, 0.12);
        font-family:
            "Segoe UI",
            "Segoe UI Variable",
            system-ui,
            -apple-system,
            sans-serif;
        line-height: 1.6;
        color: var(--f-text);
        background-color: var(--f-surface);
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 100%;
        overflow-x: hidden;
        margin: 0 !important;
        padding: 0 !important;
    }

    .pricing-page * {
        box-sizing: border-box;
    }

    .pricing-page p:empty,
    .pricing-page .pricing-container > p:empty,
    .pricing-page .pricing-page > p:empty,
    .pricing-cards > p:empty {
        display: none !important;
        margin: 0 !important;
        padding: 0 !important;
        height: 0 !important;
        min-height: 0 !important;
        max-height: 0 !important;
        line-height: 0 !important;
        width: 0 !important;
        max-width: 0 !important;
        overflow: hidden !important;
        visibility: hidden !important;
        position: absolute !important;
        opacity: 0 !important;
    }

    .pricing-page p:empty::before,
    .pricing-page p:empty::after {
        content: none !important;
    }

    .pricing-page p {
        margin-top: 0;
    }

    .entry-content .pricing-page p:empty,
    .entry-content.clear .pricing-page p:empty,
    .entry-content .pricing-cards > p:empty,
    .entry-content.clear .pricing-cards > p:empty {
        display: none !important;
        margin: 0 !important;
        padding: 0 !important;
        height: 0 !important;
        min-height: 0 !important;
        max-height: 0 !important;
        line-height: 0 !important;
        width: 0 !important;
        max-width: 0 !important;
        overflow: hidden !important;
        visibility: hidden !important;
        position: absolute !important;
        opacity: 0 !important;
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-container {
        max-width: 1200px;
        width: 100%;
        margin: 0 auto;
        padding: 0 20px;
        overflow-x: hidden;
    }

    /* Hero (Fluent, full-bleed) — gelombang absolute di tepi bawah header */
    .pricing-page .pricing-hero {
        --pricing-hero-wave-h: clamp(40px, 7vw, 56px);
        background: var(--f-gradient-hero);
        color: #ffffff;
        padding: 72px 0 var(--pricing-hero-wave-h);
        text-align: center;
        position: relative;
        overflow: hidden;
        margin-bottom: 0;
        box-shadow: inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
        display: block;
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-hero::before {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        inset: 0;
        z-index: 0;
        background-image:
            radial-gradient(rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.07) 1px, transparent 1px),
            radial-gradient(
                ellipse 120% 80% at 100% 0%,
                rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14) 0%,
                transparent 55%
            ),
            radial-gradient(
                ellipse 90% 70% at 0% 100%,
                rgba(61, 53, 177, 0.45) 0%,
                transparent 50%
            );
        background-size:
            32px 32px,
            100% 100%,
            100% 100%;
        pointer-events: none;
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-hero-orb1 {
        position: absolute;
        z-index: 0;
        width: 560px;
        height: 560px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: radial-gradient(
            circle,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14) 0%,
            transparent 62%
        );
        top: -38%;
        right: -14%;
        pointer-events: none;
        filter: blur(1px);
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-hero-orb2 {
        position: absolute;
        z-index: 0;
        width: 420px;
        height: 420px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: radial-gradient(
            circle,
            rgba(61, 53, 177, 0.55) 0%,
            transparent 68%
        );
        bottom: -32%;
        left: -10%;
        pointer-events: none;
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-hero .pricing-container {
        position: relative;
        z-index: 2;
        width: 100%;
        padding-bottom: 38px;
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-hero-content {
        position: relative;
        z-index: 2;
        max-width: 760px;
        margin: 0 auto;
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-hero h1 {
        font-size: clamp(32px, 5vw, 48px);
        font-weight: 800;
        line-height: 1.12;
        margin: 0 0 18px;
        color: #ffffff;
        letter-spacing: -0.5px;
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-hero-lead {
        font-size: 18px;
        color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.82);
        line-height: 1.7;
        max-width: 700px;
        margin: 0 auto !important;
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-hero-meta {
        font-size: 16px;
        color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.72);
        margin-top: 14px !important;
        margin-bottom: 0 !important;
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-main {
        padding: 56px 0 80px;
    }

    /* Plan intro */
    .pricing-page .pricing-plans-block {
        margin-bottom: 56px;
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-section-head {
        text-align: center;
        margin-bottom: 28px;
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-section-head h2 {
        font-size: clamp(26px, 3.5vw, 30px);
        font-weight: 800;
        margin: 0 0 14px;
        color: var(--f-text);
        letter-spacing: -0.3px;
        position: relative;
        display: inline-block;
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-section-head h2::after {
        content: "";
        display: block;
        width: 44px;
        height: 3px;
        margin: 10px auto 0;
        border-radius: 3px;
        background: var(--f-gradient);
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-section-head p {
        margin: 0;
        color: var(--f-text-muted);
        font-size: 16px;
        line-height: 1.65;
        max-width: 640px;
        margin-left: auto !important;
        margin-right: auto !important;
    }

    /* Plan cards */
    .pricing-page .plan-cards-grid,
    .pricing-page .plan-cards-grid * {
        box-sizing: border-box !important;
    }

    .pricing-page .plan-cards-grid {
        display: flex !important;
        flex-direction: row !important;
        flex-wrap: nowrap !important;
        gap: 22px !important;
        align-items: stretch !important;
        width: 100% !important;
        max-width: 920px !important;
        margin: 0 auto !important;
        padding: 0 !important;
    }

    .pricing-page .plan-cards-grid > .pricing-plan-card {
        flex: 1 1 50% !important;
        min-width: 0 !important;
        width: auto !important;
        display: block !important;
        float: none !important;
        clear: none !important;
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-plan-card {
        border-radius: 20px;
        padding: 26px 24px 24px;
        position: relative;
        overflow: hidden;
        border: 1px solid var(--f-border);
        box-shadow: var(--f-elev-2);
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-plan-card--standard {
        background: linear-gradient(165deg, #ffffff 0%, #faf8ff 100%);
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-plan-card--standard::after {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        top: -36px;
        right: -36px;
        width: 128px;
        height: 128px;
        background: radial-gradient(
            circle,
            rgba(13, 143, 110, 0.14) 0%,
            transparent 68%
        );
        border-radius: 50%;
        pointer-events: none;
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-plan-card--premium {
        background: var(--f-gradient);
        border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.22);
        color: #ffffff;
        box-shadow: var(--f-elev-3);
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-plan-card--premium::after {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        top: -40px;
        right: -40px;
        width: 148px;
        height: 148px;
        background: radial-gradient(
            circle,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18) 0%,
            transparent 68%
        );
        border-radius: 50%;
        pointer-events: none;
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-plan-card-inner {
        position: relative;
        z-index: 1;
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-plan-icon {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        width: 64px;
        height: 64px;
        border-radius: 18px;
        margin-bottom: 12px;
        box-shadow: var(--f-elev-1);
        transform: perspective(420px) rotateX(4deg);
        transition:
            transform 0.25s ease,
            box-shadow 0.25s ease;
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-plan-card:hover .pricing-plan-icon {
        transform: perspective(420px) rotateX(0deg) translateY(-2px);
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-plan-icon--fluent svg {
        display: block;
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-plan-icon--asset img {
        display: block;
        width: 36px;
        height: 36px;
        object-fit: contain;
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-plan-card--standard .pricing-plan-icon--fluent {
        color: #ffffff;
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-plan-card--premium .pricing-plan-icon--fluent {
        color: #ffffff;
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-plan-card--standard .pricing-plan-icon {
        background: linear-gradient(
            165deg,
            #3e3a9c 0%,
            #3b4084 48%,
            #5c57b2 100%
        );
        border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.22);
        box-shadow:
            0 6px 18px rgba(13, 143, 110, 0.28),
            inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.28);
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-plan-card--premium .pricing-plan-icon {
        background: linear-gradient(
            165deg,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.32) 0%,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14) 100%
        );
        border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.38);
        box-shadow:
            0 6px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.14),
            inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.42);
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-plan-pill {
        display: inline-block;
        padding: 6px 14px;
        border-radius: 999px;
        font-size: 12px;
        font-weight: 700;
        letter-spacing: 0.3px;
        margin-bottom: 10px;
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-plan-card--standard .pricing-plan-pill {
        background: var(--f-success-soft);
        color: #056149;
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-plan-card--premium .pricing-plan-pill {
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
        color: #ffffff;
        border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.28);
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-plan-card--standard .pricing-plan-title {
        font-size: 26px;
        font-weight: 800;
        margin: 0 0 6px;
        color: var(--f-text);
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-plan-card--premium .pricing-plan-title {
        font-size: 26px;
        font-weight: 800;
        margin: 0 0 6px;
        color: #ffffff;
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-plan-card--standard .pricing-plan-desc {
        margin: 0 0 12px;
        color: var(--f-text-muted);
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-plan-card--premium .pricing-plan-desc {
        margin: 0 0 12px;
        color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92);
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-plan-list {
        list-style: none;
        padding: 0;
        margin: 0;
        font-size: 14px;
        line-height: 1.65;
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-plan-card--standard .pricing-plan-list {
        color: var(--f-text);
    }

    .pricing-page .pricing-plan-card--premium .pricing-plan-list {
        color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.94);
    }

    /* Cara Kerja — tanpa “card” section; latar mengikuti .pricing-page */
    .pricing-page .how-it-works {
        position: relative;

	<div class="pricing-page">

Sebagai <strong>provider API terlengkap di Indonesia</strong>, kami menawarkan harga paling terjangkau di pasar sambil mempertahankan kualitas dan keandalan tingkat profesional.</p>
<p class="pricing-hero-meta">Semua harga dalam points. 1 IDR = 1 Point</p></div>

<h2 id="limit-paket-semua-api">Limit Paket untuk Semua API</h2>

<div class="how-it-works">
<h2 id="cara-kerja">Cara Kerja</h2>
<div class="how-it-works-grid">
<div class="how-it-works-item">
<div class="how-it-works-icon" aria-hidden="true"><img alt="" decoding="async" height="44" loading="lazy" src="https://api.co.id/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/icons8-money-94.png" width="44"></div>
<h3>1. Top Up Balance</h3>
<p>Tambahkan points ke saldo akun Anda menggunakan IDR (1 IDR = 1 Point)</p></div>
<div class="how-it-works-item">

<div class="faq-section">
<h2 id="faq-harga">Pertanyaan yang Sering Diajukan</h2>
<div class="faq-grid">
<div class="faq-item">
<h3>❓ Bagaimana cara points dikurangi?</h3>
<p>Points hanya dikurangi untuk <strong>successful API hits</strong>. Request yang gagal, error, atau response rate limit exceeded tidak mengurangi points. Setiap API memiliki biaya per successful hit sendiri seperti yang tertera dalam tabel harga di atas.</p></div>
<div class="faq-item">
<h3>❓ Apa yang terjadi jika points habis?</h3>
<p>Ketika saldo Anda mencapai nol, API requests akan ditolak dengan error “Insufficient Balance”. Cukup top up saldo Anda untuk melanjutkan penggunaan API. Tidak ada penalti atau biaya tambahan ketika points habis.</p></div>
<div class="faq-item">
<h3>❓ Apakah ada API yang gratis?</h3>
<p>Ya! Beberapa API benar-benar gratis (0 points per hit). API-API ini ditandai dengan “FREE” dalam tabel harga. Anda dapat menggunakan API gratis tanpa pengurangan points, bahkan jika saldo Anda nol.</p></div>
<div class="faq-item">
<h3>❓ Mengapa harga kami lebih terjangkau dibandingkan kompetitor?</h3>
<p>Sebagai provider API terlengkap di Indonesia, kami berkomitmen untuk menyediakan harga API paling terjangkau sambil mempertahankan kualitas, keandalan, dan dukungan tingkat profesional. Kami percaya pada harga yang adil dan transparan yang dapat diskalakan sesuai kebutuhan Anda tanpa biaya tersembunyi atau langganan.</p></div>
<div class="faq-item">
<h3>❓ Bisakah saya mendapatkan refund?</h3>
<p>Points tidak dapat direfund setelah dibeli. Namun, points yang tidak digunakan tidak pernah kedaluwarsa dan tetap berada di saldo akun Anda tanpa batas waktu. Anda dapat menggunakannya kapan saja untuk melakukan API calls.</p></div>
<div class="faq-item">
<h3>❓ Apakah ada biaya setup?</h3>
<p>Tidak! Tidak ada biaya setup, langganan bulanan, atau biaya tersembunyi. Anda hanya membayar untuk yang Anda gunakan. Mulai gunakan API kami segera setelah mendaftar dan menambahkan points ke saldo Anda.</p></div>

					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>
